summary: Accepted 270 gaps after backend merge and workspace parity wiring.

gaps.detail: The workspace shell uses a seed-backed 270 merge helper that matches the published route bundle, but it does not yet fetch the live merge query from command-api.

The 270 merge law covers queue, callback, self-care, bounded admin, completion, and next-task posture. Clinician-message delivery remains its own peer route and is not promoted into the 270 dominant-family vocabulary.
